title: Finn's Additions
description: it adds some new advancements and some plants and potions.
body:
This is a mod that adds some achievments and items.

A new grass called devils ivy that spawns im most biomes, can be cooked then brewed into the potion of ditermination and gives the player the rage effect.

new trade from master clerics. Its called the omni shard. I is used to create the Omnicore and powered Omnicore. Theses are currently usless.

Adds 6 new achievements that blend in with the vinilla game.
